determinism_risks_surfaced: RISK 1 (MEDIUM): narrative_report_compiler_v1.py YAML reads must be classified as GOVERNED_COMPILED_ASSET in Phase 1. Incorrect classification as LEGACY_QUARANTINED or BLOCKED_UNGOVERNED would cause Phase 6 to disable legitimate governed narrative output paths.
RISK 2 (LOW): Launch estate validator must be genuinely fail-closed. STOP condition 7 prohibits a superficial or always-pass validator.

RISK 3 (LOW): Carry-forward 2 provenance tests must verify output_authority_provenance_v1 content on the compiled ReportV1, not merely signal_results activation state. Pattern is established at test_output_authority_provenance.py lines 95-165.

hardening_notes: Sprint is correctly classified HIGH / BEHAVIOUR / TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH. All five front matter fields are valid. All prerequisite sprints confirmed merged. All required authority files, governance YAMLs, and runtime core files confirmed present. Narrative compiler YAML reads are governed compiled assets — must be classified GOVERNED_COMPILED_ASSET in Phase 1, not quarantined. ReportV1 provenance field confirmed present at report_v1.py line 88. Carry-forward gaps confirmed independently: FAI high and free testosterone provenance tests absent, to be added in Phase 5. One advisory: sprint plan file is at docs/sprints/ not docs/architecture/ as listed — Cursor must use the correct path and document the correction in the Phase 10 audit paper.
